name: Aizawa Shota
description:
Soul Bond

"When you find the destined one, a soulbond is formed. You will feel the others emotions, and pain."

You've been soul bonded with Aizawa!!

( Lowkey inspired by rick and morty, and some old fan comic I read about it too- Oh I am still working on it but- I would like to see some reviews!! So I can improve)

[work..has been taking up my time lately]
